steps.title: Use the style contrast
steps.content: Moreau's realist painting emphasizes accurate portrayal of ordinary working people. Lambert's romantic style instead presents staged settings and idealized, unblemished subjects. The blank needs a verb showing that realism went against those romantic conventions.

steps.title: Avoid similarity meanings
steps.content: Choice B means copied, Choice C means built on, and Choice D means perfectly represented. All three imply similarity or continuation, but the passage contrasts realism with romantic idealization. A verb meaning refused to follow those conventions fits. The answer is A.
